name: agility-speed-test
description: A speed & agility testing session: a 5-10-5 pro-agility shuttle (timed change-of-direction drill) and a 40 m maximal sprint. Shows the v0.6 `qualities` axis on a `test`-intent Session carrying `agility` + `speed`; the agility drill is a `time`-scored result, the sprint a `continuous` unit recording distance + time. Confirms speed/agility tests need no new primitive.
